item.title: Status dashboard + logs + updates
item.intent: Deliver status, logs, and update commands so operators can observe agent state, diagnose failures, and safely update without data loss.
item.description: USER VALUE: Important day-2 ops visibility but not blocking first agent. Users need a working agent before they need to watch its status. Depends on CQ-003+CQ-012 anyway. Promote to must when ops track begins.
steps: Implement 'clawhq status [--watch]' showing current agent state
Implement 'clawhq logs' for viewing agent logs
Implement 'clawhq update [--check]' with automatic rollback on failure
acceptanceCriteria: 'clawhq status' shows current agent state clearly
'clawhq update' applies updates with rollback on failure
